problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
